pass1_value.note: The Help Center documents how a user can generate a personal API token from Profile → Apps (self-serve). The docs do not explicitly state a paid-plan requirement; pricing page does not indicate API is restricted to paid plans, so credential creation appears self-serve. However there is no single page explicitly stating 'free plan users may create API tokens', hence medium confidence.

final_value.note: ClickUp Help Center shows self-serve steps to generate an API Token from within the product UI (Avatar → Settings → Apps → API Token → Generate). The page does not state any paid-plan requirement, so access appears self-serve; confidence remains medium because the doc does not explicitly confirm Free-plan eligibility.
